## homelab-nut inventory edit

Open the inventory in $EDITOR and re-validate on save

```
homelab-nut inventory edit [flags]
```

### Options

```

```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -i, --inventory string   path to the inventory YAML file (default: ./homelab-nut.yaml if present, else ~/homelab-nut.yaml)
```
